title: CustomerProfileLookupArgs
description: Arguments accepted by the UC1 sandbox-customer-profile connector. Reads a customer-of-record entry plus declared vulnerability markers from the broker firm's customer-of-record store; the store boundary is read-only for the connector port, the write path lives on the same logical store but is reached only through the firm's customer-of-record write surfaces, not this adapter.

enquiry_ref.description: Enquiry the lookup is performed for; correlated into audit.

lookup_policy_ref.description: Policy snapshot reference under which the lookup is authorised.
